overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage featuring a blue-skinned Na'vi character exploring an industrial research facility. The character walks through various indoor sections including a commons area with warm lighting, a laboratory workshop, and a dark blue-lit corridor, passing NPCs and scientific equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commons area with hydroponic gardens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main hall toward the orange double doors, passing hydroponic plant shelves on the left

notable_agents.action: human NPC sitting at a metal workbench on the right side

entered.detail: large yellow structural support beams crisscrossing the ceiling
tan fabric tarps hanging from the ceiling providing partial cover
metal grate flooring covering the walkway
tall shelving units with green leafy plants growing under artificial light
large cylindrical ventilation pipes running along the right wall
large industrial double doors painted orange at the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The Na'vi character walks through a spacious industrial commons area with yellow support beams overhead and fabric canopies hanging from the ceiling. Hydroponic shelves with green plants line the left wall while the character approaches a set of orange double doors in the distance. A single NPC sits at a workbench on the right.

events.description: turns left and enters the workshop area filled with laboratory equipment and workstations

agents.ego_description: walking through the laboratory workshop, passing scientific workbenches and equipment racks

notable_agents.action: NPC in white lab coat working at a laboratory counter

entered.detail: metal workbench with scientific instruments and glassware
large blue cylindrical storage containers stacked against the wall
racks of laboratory equipment and glass containers
desktop computer with glowing screen on a desk
tall metal shelving units holding various tools and supplies
multiple display screens showing data readouts

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a laboratory workshop area filled with scientific equipment. Blue storage barrels are visible in the background while a lab-coated NPC works at a counter on the left. The warm artificial lighting continues as the character moves past computer terminals and equipment racks.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage and utility area transitioning to technical corridor

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from warm orange to cool blue as entering the deeper facility sections

agents.ego_description: continuing through the facility past storage cabinets and utility desks, moving toward darker sections

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting at a computer workstation monitoring screens

entered.detail: tall metal lockers and storage cabinets
cluttered work desk with tools and equipment
industrial shelving units holding boxes and containers
computer monitors emitting blue light in the darker environment
large metal ventilation ducts running along the ceiling
work areas illuminated by blue emergency lighting
large mechanical equipment and generators
network of pipes and conduits crossing the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a storage and utility area where the lighting gradually shifts from warm to cool blue. Storage shelves and industrial machinery line the walls while an NPC works at a computer station. The environment becomes darker with blue-lit workstations and visible ventilation ducts overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridor with bulkhead door

events.description: approaches the large industrial bulkhead door at the end of the narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow corridor toward the large exit door, passing wall-mounted equipment

entered.detail: corridor walls illuminated by blue emergency lighting
massive industrial security door with metal plating
yellow structural frame surrounding the bulkhead door
pipes and conduits running along the right wall of the narrow corridor
glowing green exit sign on the left wall
control panels and interfaces mounted on the right wall
technical equipment and boxes attached to the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dimly lit maintenance corridor with blue emergency lighting. The large bulkhead door looms ahead at the end of the passage, framed by yellow structural supports. Wall-mounted equipment and emergency signage line the corridor as the character approaches the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an industrial research facility that transforms from a warm, open commons area into a cold, dimly lit maintenance corridor. It begins with the Na'vi character walking past hydroponic shelves and yellow support beams toward orange double doors, passing a lone worker at a workbench. As the character turns left, the scene opens into a laboratory workshop filled with scientific equipment and computer terminals under warm artificial lighting. The environment then shifts into a utility area where the light gradually transitions from warm gold to a cool blue, moving past industrial machinery and blue-lit workstations. Finally, the camera follows the character into a narrow, dark corridor illuminated by blue emergency lighting, heading toward a large bulkhead door framed by yellow structural supports.
